title: sedum acre var. glaciale
intro: Sedum acre var. glaciale, also known as ice plant, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sedum acre var. glaciale include its ability to help reduce inflammation and fight off infections, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Sedum acre var. glaciale can be prepared as a topical ointment or salve, or consumed as a tea or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
